---
title: "Teaching"
---

## Current courses

- Fall 2025: [EAS 42000 / EAS A4200: Statistical Methods in Earth and Atmospheric Sciences](https://spencerahill.github.io/25f-stat-methods-course/home.html)

---

## Upcoming courses

- Spring 2026: EAS 48800 / EAS B8800 / SUS 7300B: Climate and Climate Change

---

## Past courses

- Spring 2025: [EAS 48800 / EAS B8800 / SUS 7300B: Climate and Climate Change](https://spencerahill.github.io/clim-change-course_2025/home.html)
- Fall 2024: EAS 30000/B1300: Earth and Environmental Science Seminar
- Spring 2024: [EAS 48800 / EAS B8800 / SUS 7300B: Climate and Climate Change](https://spencerahill.github.io/clim-change-course_2024/home.html)
- Fall 2023: [EAS 42000 / EAS A4200: Statistical Methods in Earth and Atmospheric Sciences](https://spencerahill.github.io/stat-methods-course/home.html)

---

## K-12 / public education and outreach

- Weather and Climate Livestream talk 2025-05-31: <https://www.youtube.com/live/RlXBjfIdl-I>
- "You Spin Me Right Round" Feb 2021 livestreamed talk for K-12 students:
  <https://www.earth.columbia.edu/videos/view/you-spin-me-right-round>
- See the [DIYnamics](https://diynamics.github.io) website for more.
